trans-unit.source:
Could not find testhost for test source '{0}'.
Verify that: - The test project references the 'Microsoft.NET.Test.Sdk' NuGet package. - The project has been built and the output is in '{1}'. - The project's target framework matches the installed .NET runtime.
trans-unit.target:
無法為測試來源 '{0}' 找到 testhost。
請確認:
- 測試專案參考 'Microsoft.NET.Test.Sdk' NuGet 套件。 - 專案已建置，且輸出位於 '{1}'。 - 專案的目標 Framework 與已安裝的 .NET 執行階段相符。
trans-unit.note: '{0}' is the path to the test source (DLL/EXE), '{1}' is the directory where testhost was searched.

trans-unit.source: Multiple versions of same extension found. Selecting the highest version. {0}
trans-unit.target: 找到相同延伸模組的多個版本。系統會選取最高版本。 {0}

trans-unit.source: Unable to find {0}. Make sure test project has a nuget reference of package "Microsoft.NET.Test.Sdk".
trans-unit.target: 找不到 {0}。請確認測試專案有 "Microsoft.NET.Test.Sdk "套件的 nuget 參考。

trans-unit.source: Unable to find {0}. Please publish your test project and retry.
trans-unit.target: 找不到 {0}。請發佈您的測試專案並重試。

trans-unit.source:
Could not find '{0}' host for the '{1}' architecture.
You can resolve the problem by installing the '{1}' .NET.
The specified framework can be found at: - https://aka.ms/dotnet-download
trans-unit.target:
找不到 '{1}' 架構的 '{0}' 主機。
您可以安裝 '{1}' .NET 來解決問題。
指定的架構可在下列位置找到: - https://aka.ms/dotnet-download
trans-unit.note: '{0}' is the placeholder for 'dotnet.exe' or 'dotnet' value and depends on platform Windows/Unix, '{1}' is the placeholder for the architeture name like ARM64, X64 etc...

trans-unit.source:
Could not find the .NET Framework test host at '{0}'.
This .NET SDK does not include the .NET Framework test host needed to run .NET Framework tests with Mono.
To fix this, migrate your tests to target .NET instead of .NET Framework.
trans-unit.target:
Could not find the .NET Framework test host at '{0}'.
This .NET SDK does not include the .NET Framework test host needed to run .NET Framework tests with Mono.
To fix this, migrate your tests to target .NET instead of .NET Framework.
trans-unit.note: '{0}' is the full path where testhost.exe was expected to be found.
